seoTitle: How to Create and Use a Discount Code on Gumroad
metaDescription: Learn how to generate a promotional discount code on Gumroad, set redemption limits, and share a checkout link that applies the offer.
intro: Discount codes give you a way to reward repeat customers, run limited promotions, or reward affiliates on Gumroad. This guide shows how to create a code, decide on its structure, and distribute it so buyers can redeem the offer at checkout.

steps.heading: Open the offers and discounts section
steps.body: Navigate to your product's promotional settings where discount codes are managed.

steps.heading: Create a new offer
steps.body: Start a new discount and assign it to the product or products you want it to apply to.

steps.heading: Choose your code and discount type
steps.body: Pick a memorable code string and decide between a percentage or fixed cash discount.

steps.heading: Set redemption limits
steps.body: Optionally restrict the code by usage count or expiration date to control the promotion.

steps.heading: Share your discount link
steps.body: Distribute the generated checkout link with the discount pre-applied to your audience.

faq.question: How do I create a custom discount code on Gumroad?
faq.answer: You create it from the offers and discounts section of your product, where you can define your own code string.

faq.question: Can I expire a discount code after a certain date?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad lets you set an expiration date so the code stops working after your promotion ends.

faq.question: Do discount codes work for both new and existing products?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create discount codes for any of your published digital products.

faq.question: Can I track how many times a code was used?
faq.answer: Gumroad shows redemption activity for your offers so you can monitor performance.
